nodes.name: Cassin's flycatcher
nodes.summary: Cassin's flycatcher（Muscicapa cassini）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cassin's flycatcher。

nodes.name: Cassin's flycatcher
nodes.summary: Cassin's flycatcher (Muscicapa cassini), also known as Cassin's grey flycatcher or Cassin's alseonax, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical swamps. References

nodes.name: Muscicapa
